scope: One intended latest-year Chevrolet profile record for every model slug in chevrolet-us-nameplates.json. This catalog records representative-selection decisions and uncertainty; it does not claim that SVG artwork has been completed.

status_definitions.current-model-reviewed: A representative configuration has been selected for a current model from the existing latest-year catalog and platform evidence.
status_definitions.era-mapped: The latest platform or era is sourced and a single representative body architecture is sufficiently identified for profile work.
status_definitions.representative-variant-research-needed: The latest year is catalogued, but a body-specific representative remains unresolved or still needs a body-specific visual reference before exact SVG work.
